parameters.name: method
parameters.label: Method
parameters.description: Choose to use a line from the 2nd input (defined using UV coordinates) or values to define the lookup table.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.label: Index Channel
parameters.description: The Index Channel controls how the color from the input is turned into a index to do the lookup. By default, the RGBA Independent option will do a separate lookup in each channel i.e. the red output c

parameters.name: independentalpha
parameters.label: Independent Alpha
parameters.description: When enabled, the Alpha value of the output image is retrieved independently from the lookup table based on the alpha channel of the index image (the first input). This option can reproduce the legacy

parameters.name: chop
parameters.label: CHOP
parameters.description: the to use to define the RGBA (A is optional) values in the lookup table.

parameters.name: displaylookup
parameters.label: Output Lookup
parameters.description: Outputs the lookup table itself, instead of replacing the color values of the first input.

parameters.name: index2
parameters.label: Index2
parameters.description: The Index Range maps the index values to the lookup table's start and end and defaults to 0 and 1. The first parameter represents the start of the lookup table. When the index color has this value, it

parameters.name: lightuv2
parameters.label: Lightuv2
parameters.description: Set the UV position to use for light end of the lookup table. In the original image connected to the first input, any pixel with a value of (1,1,1) will be replaced by the value found at this UV posit

parameters.name: darkuv2
parameters.label: Darkuv2
parameters.description: Set the UV position to use for dark end of the lookup table. In the original image connected to the first input, any pixel with a value of (0,0,0) will be replaced by the value found at this UV positi
